adventures.title: Riding to the mountain
adventures.desc: Discover Los Acuáticos, a mountain community in Viñales known for its faith in the healing properties of water. Immerse yourself in their traditions, share with the residents, and enjoy their hospitality while admiring the breathtaking views of the Viñales and Palmarito Valleys. A unique experience that combines nature, culture, and tradition.

imgs.alt: Tourists riding along a trail with views of the Viñales mogotes
Panoramic view from the mountain towards the lush vegetation of the valley
Traditional house of the Los Acuáticos community with a white horse grazing

adventures.title: A fascinating landscape
adventures.desc: Explore the Palmarito Valley, a stunning landscape where the contrast between red lands and lush vegetation reflects the rural Cuban essence. Enjoy panoramic views, learn about peasant traditions, and discover tobacco cultivation from local farmers.

imgs.alt: Riders traveling through the red soil trails characteristic of the Palmarito Valley
Traditional tobacco house where the cultivation techniques of local farmers are learned
Panoramic view of the lush vegetation and the rural environment of the Palmarito area

adventures.title: The setting sun
adventures.desc: A horseback ride through Viñales allows you to travel through mountains and valleys surrounded by living nature. Along the way, local farmers share their work in the tobacco crops, while you enjoy a criollo cigar and a Saoco Viñalero at sunset in the peaceful Valley of Silence. The day concludes with a refreshing dip in a nearby lake while watching the sunset.

imgs.alt: Tourists enjoying the sunset over the valley from a viewpoint
Local farmer sharing the tradition of the Cuban tobacco with visitors
Visitors tasting a Saoco Viñalero in a natural coconut during the break

adventures.title: La Penitencia Valley
adventures.desc: Explore the La Penitencia Valley, a small but stunning destination with agricultural landscapes and great natural beauty. On this excursion, you will enjoy its agricultural richness and visit the Prehistory Mural, one of the largest outdoor frescoes, representing the geological evolution of Viñales.

imgs.alt: Panoramic view of the natural beauty and agricultural landscapes of the valley
The Prehistory Mural in Viñales, one of the largest outdoor fresco paintings
Local farmers working in the traditional crops of the La Penitencia Valley

adventures.title: The most famous one
adventures.desc: Discover the impressive Viñales Valley, a world-renowned destination for its magnitude, beauty, and cultural richness. In a tour of approximately two hours, you can admire its unique landscapes and immerse yourself in authentic peasant life, interacting with the local inhabitants and learning about their traditions. An enriching experience that combines nature, history, and the cultural essence of Viñales.

imgs.alt: Impressive panoramic view of the Viñales Valley, a World Heritage site
Extensive agricultural fields showing the authentic farming life of the region
Traditional peasant house surrounded by crops in the heart of the valley
